sections.title: S — Single Responsibility Principle
sections.content: A class should have only one reason to change. One class = one job.

sections.title: O — Open/Closed Principle
sections.content: Open for extension, closed for modification. Add behaviour via new classes, not by editing existing ones.

sections.title: L — Liskov Substitution Principle
sections.content: Subtypes must be substitutable for their base types without breaking behaviour. Don't throw unexpected exceptions or weaken contracts in subclasses.

sections.title: I — Interface Segregation Principle
sections.content: Clients should not be forced to depend on interfaces they don't use. Split fat interfaces into smaller, role-specific ones.

sections.title: D — Dependency Inversion Principle
sections.content: High-level modules should not depend on low-level modules. Both should depend on abstractions.
